privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.applies_common: This policy applies to all SSAMOK SOFT apps and this website.
privacy.intro: SSAMOK SOFT ("we", "us") explains how we handle information across our apps and this website. Because our apps differ, each app's page includes a data-processing summary specific to that app.
privacy.sum_backend_firebase: Stores data in the Google Firebase cloud.
privacy.sum_backend_supabase: Stores data in the Supabase cloud.
privacy.sum_backend_local: Stores data only on your device (SQLite); nothing is sent to a server.
privacy.sum_account_yes: Signs you in with an account (email).
privacy.sum_account_no: Does not collect any account or email.
privacy.sum_ads_yes: Shows Google AdMob ads; an advertising identifier may be used.
privacy.sum_iap_yes: Offers in-app purchases via the App Store and Google Play.
privacy.s_collect_body: Depending on the app, we collect: an email address (for apps with an account), an advertising identifier (for apps that show ads), and purchase records, receipts, and transaction identifiers (for apps with in-app purchases). Some apps store data only on your device and collect no personal information on a server. We do not collect payment card information.
privacy.s_purpose_body: We use collected information to manage accounts and verify users, operate and provide our services, handle in-app purchases and purchase history, respond to inquiries, improve our services, and deliver advertising.
privacy.s_iap_body: Some apps offer in-app purchases through the App Store and Google Play. Payments are handled by each store; we do not collect or store payment card information. We may process purchase-related information such as receipts and transaction identifiers for purchase validation and support.
privacy.s_thirdparty_body: Depending on the app, we use: Google Firebase (authentication, database, usage analytics, crash analysis), Supabase (backend for upcoming apps), Google AdMob (ad delivery and measurement), and the App Store and Google Play (in-app purchase processing). Apps that store data only on your device do not transmit it to a server. The services each app actually uses are listed in that app's data-processing summary.
privacy.s_ads_body: Some apps may show ads through Google AdMob. An advertising identifier and similar data may be used to deliver and measure ads. You can reset your advertising identifier or limit ad personalization in your device settings.
privacy.s_retention_body: We retain personal information while your account remains active. You may request deletion of your account and data at any time by emailing ssamoksoft@gmail.com, and we will delete it within 30 days of verifying your request, except where the law requires longer retention. For apps that store data only on your device, the data is removed when you delete the app.
privacy.s_storage_body: Depending on the app, data is stored in the Google Firebase or Supabase cloud, or only on your device. For cloud-stored data, passwords and sensitive information are encrypted, and we maintain quarterly self-audits, access controls, access logs kept for at least six months, and intrusion prevention and detection systems.
privacy.s_rights_body: You may request to access, correct, delete, or suspend the processing of your personal information, and you can also use the privacy controls provided by the App Store and Google Play.
privacy.s_children_body: Our apps are not directed to children under the age required by applicable law, and we do not knowingly collect their personal information.
privacy.s_contact_body: Privacy officer: Dae-hoon Kang. For any privacy question or request, contact us at ssamoksoft@gmail.com.
privacy.s_changes_body: If this policy changes, we will post the update on this page, and the revised policy takes effect when posted.
privacy.sum_extra_social: Signs you in with Google or Apple (collects email, display name, and nickname).
privacy.sum_extra_fcm: Uses an FCM device token to deliver push notifications.
privacy.sum_extra_revenuecat: Processes subscription and purchase information via RevenueCat.
privacy.sum_extra_inapp_delete: You can delete your account immediately via Settings → Delete account in the app; your records in shared rooms are anonymized.

kairotique_delete.title: Delete your Kairotique account
kairotique_delete.applies: This page explains how to delete your account and data for the app “Kairotique” by SSAMOK SOFT. You can request deletion without reinstalling the app.

sections.t: Option 1 — Delete in the app (recommended, immediate)
sections.b: In the Kairotique app, go to Settings → Delete account. Your account and data are deleted immediately.

sections.t: Option 2 — Request by email (no app required)
sections.b: From the email address you signed up with, send a message to ssamoksoft@gmail.com with the subject “Kairotique account deletion request”. After identity verification, your request is processed within 7 days.
Your account information (email and nickname) and all rooms and records you created are deleted. Records you left in other rooms you participated in are anonymized, with author information removed.

Subscriptions (premium) are separate from account deletion. If you have an active subscription, cancel it directly in Google Play or the App Store — deleting your account does not cancel it automatically.
For questions about deletion, contact ssamoksoft@gmail.com.

kairotique_terms.title: Kairotique Terms of Service
kairotique_terms.applies: These terms govern your use of the mobile app “Kairotique” (the “Service”) provided by SSAMOK SOFT (the “Company”). By using the Service, you agree to these terms.

sections.b: Kairotique is a shared log and timer platform where you create rooms and use timers and records together. The Company may improve or change the Service's features over time.

You use the Service by signing in with a Google or Apple account. You are responsible for activity on your account and must notify the Company promptly of any unauthorized use. You can delete your account at any time via Settings → Delete account in the app.

The Service offers premium features via subscription, and payments are processed through the App Store or Google Play. Subscriptions may auto-renew under each store's policy, and cancellations and refunds follow each store's policies and procedures. The Company does not collect or store payment card information, and deleting your account does not cancel a subscription.

You retain your rights to the content you create in the Service, such as rooms, records, and notes. The Company may use that content to the extent needed to provide the Service, including storage, syncing, and display to participants of shared rooms; content posted in a shared room is visible to that room's other participants.

Violating the law or infringing others' rights, posting abusive or obscene content, disrupting the Service or accessing systems without authorization, impersonating others or using another user's account, and reverse engineering, scraping, or abusing the Service with automated means are prohibited. The Company may remove content, restrict use, or suspend accounts for violations.

sections.t: 6. Changes to or discontinuation of the Service
sections.b: The Company may change or discontinue all or part of the Service for operational or technical reasons, with prior notice for material changes.

The Service is provided “as is.” To the extent permitted by law, the Company is not liable for indirect or incidental damages arising from use of the Service, except for damages caused by the Company's willful misconduct or gross negligence.
The Company may update these terms and will post changes on this page. Updated terms take effect when posted, and continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of the Republic of Korea.
For questions about these terms, contact ssamoksoft@gmail.com.
